human_verification.notes: Human review confirmed the package is a specification-based validated overlay and does not claim a retained implementation.

materialization_requirements: Tenant must provide engagement scope, client commitments, jurisdiction list, payroll calendar, pay frequencies, deposit schedule, filing obligations, system-of-record connectors, approval matrix, reviewer queue, and payment authority boundaries.

Runtime must preserve refusal triggers for missing records, unauthorized pay changes, tax remittance risk, confidentiality conflicts, source conflicts, tax or legal advice, payment approval, return signature, contractual signoff, and attestation authority.

Runtime must log scope verdict, evidence references, lifecycle state, blocked items, tax exceptions, secure-delivery posture, reviewer signoff, and orchestrator return reason for each payroll workflow.
notes: Structured readiness evidence supports the validated claim for a spec pack only.
Promotion to retained implementation requires a separate build PR, runtime implementation, and governance approval.
